content.text:
Project is empty. Here's the plan I'll submit:

- Runtime: php-nginx@8.4 — dev (appdev) + stage (appstage) pair (standard mode)
- Database: mariadb@10.6 (MySQL-compatible — MySQL isn't in the Zerops catalog, MariaDB is the standard substitute)
- Cache/Sessions: valkey@7.2

Sound good, or do you want to adjust anything (e.g. PostgreSQL instead of MariaDB, different PHP version)?
